allowed_claim_sentence: Under HEADROOM_SEMANTIC_FIDELITY_D004, synthetic agent history semantic gate did not satisfy the combined semantic-field and >=60% token-reduction gate.
claim_boundary: This card checks same-meaning preservation only through predeclared structured fields, not literal answer equality. It covers one local Ollama model and one synthetic fixture family; it does not generalize to all prompts, models, proxy deployments or CCR-enabled workflows.

environment.user_declared_hardware: MacBook Pro 16 inch, Apple M1 Pro, 16 GB

semantic_gate.decision_reason: Semantic fields matched, but Headroom did not reduce tokens by the predeclared >=60% threshold for this fixture.
semantic_gate.label: synthetic agent history semantic gate
